qa_pair.question: Find the total number of contacts in our Founders pipeline that have the tag "annual-prepay" and a "Welcome Sequence" workflow attached. Return just the integer count.
List all custom fields of type SINGLE_OPTIONS configured on the contact model for our location. Return the count.
What is the name of the sales pipeline that contains a stage called "Founders Confirmed"? Return just the pipeline name.
How many sub-accounts (locations) under our agency have the country code "AU"? Return just the integer.
List all snapshots available to our agency. How many have "Founders" in their name? Return the integer count.
For the contact with email "demo@profitplatform.com.au", what is the value of their custom field "Industry"? Return just the value string.
Count the number of opportunities currently in the "Discovery Call Booked" stage of any pipeline in our location. Return the integer.
List all webhooks configured for our location. How many are subscribed to the "FormSubmit" event? Return the integer count.
What is the slot duration in minutes of the calendar named "Founders Onboarding Call"? Return just the integer.
How many users with the role "admin" have access to our location? Return just the integer count.
